The Opportunity

The audiobook gold rush is here.
Are you in?

The audiobook industry is the fastest-growing sector in all of publishing вАФ and the window to stake your claim is wide open right now.

$14B
Global market today
22%
Annual growth rate (CAGR)
$93B
Projected market by 2034
99%
Revenue now digital

Fiction dominates. Non-fiction is surging.

Fiction commands over 60% of revenue вАФ driven by serial fantasy, romance, and thriller audiences who listen on repeat. Non-fiction is the fastest-growing segment, as listeners turn to self-help, business, and education content on their commutes and workouts.

Smartphones unlocked a billion new listeners.

Global smartphone penetration has turned every commute, gym session, and errand run into a listening opportunity. The U.S. alone tops $2.2 billion in annual sales, and digital platforms now account for nearly every dollar of revenue вАФ meaning distribution costs are essentially zero.

The tools to claim your share of this market used to cost tens of thousands of dollars. Not anymore.

The Problem

Publishing an audiobook used to cost a fortune

The Old Way

  • $200вАУ$500/hr to hire a professional narrator вАФ a full book can cost $3,000+
  • Weeks of back-and-forth with narrators, editors, and cover designers
  • Steep learning curve with DAW software, ACX specs, and platform requirements
  • 10+ separate tools вАФ writing software, audio editor, cover designer, distributor

With Authorr AI

  • Professional AI narration вАФ multi-voice with character voices, done in minutes
  • From idea to audiobook in under an hour вАФ write, narrate, design, export
  • Built-in audio studio (DAW) вАФ add music, SFX, mix tracks, no experience needed
  • One platform, 10 destinations вАФ Audible, Spotify, Apple Books, and more

Everything You Need

A complete audiobook studio in your browser

AI Story Writing

Generate full chapters with multi-character dialogue, plot arcs, and genre-specific tone. Your story, amplified by AI.

Multi-Voice Narration

Assign distinct AI voices to each character. Narrator, hero, villain вАФ each gets their own voice, automatically.

Voice Cloning

Record or upload 30 seconds of your voice and narrate your entire book in your own voice with AI voice cloning technology.

Built-in Audio Studio

Professional DAW with multi-track editing, background music, SFX library, and mixing вАФ no downloads required.

AI Cover Art

AI generates stunning, genre-accurate covers sized for every platform вАФ Audible, Spotify, Apple, and more.

One-Click Publishing

Platform-ready export packages for Audible/ACX, Spotify, Apple Books, Google Play, OverDrive, Kobo, and 4 more.

Got Questions?

Frequently asked questions

No equipment needed at all. Authorr AI generates narration entirely with AI voices вАФ Cartesia's professional text-to-speech. If you want to use your own voice, the Voice Clone feature only needs a 30-second audio sample from any microphone, even your phone.
The Export page's "Audible / ACX" package downloads your audio with the correct filename format and includes a full ACX checklist (44.1kHz, noise floor, peak levels). We recommend running a quick normalize in free Audacity software before uploading, which takes under 2 minutes.
A short book (10,000вАУ20,000 words) can be written, narrated, and exported in under an hour. Longer novels take longer to narrate since TTS runs in real time, but you can walk away while it processes. AI-generated chapters take about 30 seconds each.
Yes вАФ 100%. You own your story, your narration, and your cover art. Authorr AI is a tool, not a rights holder. You can publish, sell, and monetize everything you create here freely on any platform.
Absolutely. Paste your existing manuscript into the Workspace editor and skip straight to narration and cover generation. AI writing tools are there if you want them вАФ they're never required.
The Export page prepares platform-ready packages for Audible/ACX, Spotify, Apple Books, Google Play Books, OverDrive/Libby, Findaway Voices (40+ platforms), Kobo, Barnes & Noble Press, YouTube, and Podcast/RSS feeds. Each includes a submission notes file with the exact specs and a direct link to that platform's upload page.

Platform Requirements & Guidelines

Audible

  • вАҐ 2400√Ч2400px minimum
  • вАҐ Square aspect ratio
  • вАҐ RGB color space
  • вАҐ Text must be readable at 150px

Spotify

  • вАҐ 3000√Ч3000px recommended
  • вАҐ Square format required
  • вАҐ High contrast text
  • вАҐ No promotional text

Apple

  • вАҐ 3000√Ч3000px minimum
  • вАҐ Square aspect ratio
  • вАҐ 72 DPI minimum
  • вАҐ Clear, legible text
